subject: refactor(export): replace jsPDF with pdf-lib for PDF generation
body:
Both libraries do JPEG DCTDecode passthrough (no re-encoding), but pdf-lib
also handles PNG directly via FlateDecode. Switched to PNG capture mode
(PDF_USE_PNG=true) to eliminate JPEG compression as a quality variable.

Added diagnostic image download in dev mode — when exporting a PDF, the raw
captured image is also saved as a separate file. This isolates whether quality
loss occurs in the html-to-image capture step or the PDF embedding step.

The pdf-lib API is also cleaner and more modern than jsPDF's addImage approach,
which may handle image XObject dimensions differently.

Tags: export, pdf, quality, investigation
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: pdf-quality
Semver: minor

title: replace jsPDF with pdf-lib for PDF generation
